channel.title: Library-Notes on Picnic Spoons
channel.description: Recent content in Library-Notes on Picnic Spoons

item.title: Home Education by Charlotte Mason
item.description: Notes on Charlotte Mason’s philosophy of education, including living books, narration, atmosphere, habit formation, and the cultivation of a rich intellectual life.

item.title: The Little House Series by Laura Ingalls Wilder
item.description: Notes on The Little House books, their vision of family life, work, self-reliance, childhood, and the rhythms of a household shaped by the seasons.

item.title: Tools for Conviviality by Ivan Ilich
item.description: Notes on Ivan Illich’s vision of convivial tools: technologies and institutions that expand human agency rather than constrain it.
